Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Relates to an exemption for certain property from the prohibition of alcohol sales within a certain distance from a school
Summary: Relates to an exemption for certain property from the prohibition of alcohol sales within a certain distance from a school.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the alcoholic beverage control law, in relation to an exemption for certain property from the prohibition of alcohol sales within a certain distance of a school
